title: The Problem Solvers | Michael Truell at Cursor
summary: Cursor is an AI-native coding platform that helps engineers and builders ship quality code through agents. Founded by Michael Truell, it has grown from 15 people to 700 employees and now serves over 60 percent of Fortune 500 companies.
writeup: This Claude profile covers Cursor, an AI-native coding platform that uses agents to help both engineers and non-technical builders ship code, as told by founder Michael Truell. It documents the company's growth from 15 to 700 people in two years and its reach across more than 60% of Fortune 500 companies. The piece also notes Cursor's close collaboration with Anthropic throughout its development.
